solver-source-warning.unselected-sources: Warning: Variables referenced in the solver expression are not selected as source variables

solver-help.title: Syntax help for solver expressions
solver-help.description: Solver expressions are evaluated with math.js. Use numbers, operators and math.js functions; refer to source variables with ${VariableName} or ${VariableID}.
solver-help.policy-description: Optionally specify a fragment index and how empty or non-numeric values are handled. Available policies are INC, ERROR, or a numeric replacement value; ERROR is the default.

examples.variables: add values from two source variables
examples.condition: condition: result is 1 when points are at least 5, otherwise 0
examples.fragment: use the numerator (fragment 0) of a fraction; mark empty values incomplete and non-numeric values as errors (equivalent to ${Bruch[0]:INC:ERROR})
examples.policies: use a summand; replace empty values with 0 and mark non-numeric values incomplete
